jsonLd.title: Entry-Level SEO Specialist at Pepperfry
jsonLd.description:
Join the Pepperfry family as a SEO Specialist in Mumbai. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Pepperfry:
Pepperfry is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pepperfry!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
